title: Panchatantra Trail
subtitle: wisdom and folly from the old fables
goalMeaning: You reach the end wiser than you began — the true reward of every fable.

ladders.name: Wit
ladders.meaning: The clever hare lured the lion to a well — wit outmatches brute strength.

ladders.name: Teamwork
ladders.meaning: The trapped doves flew up as one and carried off the hunter's net.

ladders.name: Loyalty
ladders.meaning: The faithful mongoose guarded the child even at its own peril.

ladders.name: Prudence
ladders.meaning: Look before you leap — the cautious live to tell the tale.

ladders.name: Patience
ladders.meaning: The patient waited by the water, and in time the fish came.

ladders.name: Cleverness
ladders.meaning: A clever plan slips free of the strongest trap.

ladders.name: Friendship
ladders.meaning: Mouse, crow, turtle and deer — true friends saved one another.

snakes.name: Greed
snakes.meaning: The greedy jackal gnawed the bowstring and was slain by the arrow.

snakes.name: Vanity
snakes.meaning: Flattered by the fox, the crow opened its beak and lost the cheese.

snakes.name: Gullibility
snakes.meaning: The trusting camel believed the sly friends — and was devoured.

snakes.name: Rashness
snakes.meaning: In haste she struck down the loyal mongoose, and wept ever after.

snakes.name: Foolish Trust
snakes.meaning: The frogs invited the snake to rule them — and were eaten one by one.

snakes.name: Pride
snakes.meaning: The proud tortoise opened its mouth to boast — and fell from the sky.

snakes.name: Meddling
snakes.meaning: The meddling monkey pulled the wedge, and the log crushed him.

snakes.name: Deceit
snakes.meaning: The crane ate the fish it promised to save — deceit ends in ruin.

snakes.name: Recklessness
snakes.meaning: One reckless leap at the summit undoes a lifetime of care.
